merged_events.event_description: The American Embassy in Tashkent was established with Michael Mozur as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: The American Embassy in Tashkent was established March 16, 1992, with Michael Mozur as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both record the establishment of the American Embassy in Tashkent on 1992-03-16.
